description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabin elevated on sturdy posts, featuring a large, shingled gable roof that extends over a spacious front deck. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a warm, natural appearance. The front facade includes a wide set of stairs leading up to the deck, which is supported by multiple columns. There are several small, rectangular windows symmetrically arranged along the front wall, and a large double door is centrally positioned. The roof has a pronounced overhang, providing shade and protection to the deck area. The structure is simple yet functional, suitable for residential or recreational use in an urban or suburban setting.
description: A wooden cabin with a large gable roof, elevated on posts, featuring a wide front deck and symmetrical windows. The design is simple and functional, with a natural wood finish and a prominent front entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide deck, central double door, symmetrical windows, and stairs leading up to the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the roof overhang and the solid wooden side wall with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the cabin, with no visible windows or doors, and the continuous wooden siding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, the edge of the deck, and the stairs, with the roof's overhang clearly visible.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with wide overhangs, covered in asphalt shingles
attribute_window_arrangement: Four small, rectangular windows symmetrically arranged on the front facade, evenly spaced on either side of the central door
attribute_door_placement: One large double door centered on the front facade, directly accessible from the deck
